chapter_title: Reporting to parents and carers – general information
snippet: Schools are required to provide a written (print or digital) student report at least twice a year to the parents or carers of each child enrolled at the school. This is a minimum requirement for school registration — schools have a legal obligation to provide a written (print or digital) student report at least twice a year to the parents/carers of each child enrolled at the school. Student reports are required to be in an accessible form and easy for parents or carers to understand. Parents want to know what was learned and how well, where improvement is needed and what should be done next. This means that reports should be written in plain English, giving parents and carers a clear picture of their child’s progress and achievement against clearly defined standards.
